goal:
Build a Premium Ludo Game (HTML, CSS, JavaScript Only)

Create a complete, production-quality Ludo Game using only HTML, CSS, and Vanilla JavaScript. Do not use any frameworks, libraries, external game engines, React, Vue, Angular, Canvas libraries, or backend services.

Goal

Build a highly polished, visually appealing, animated Ludo game that feels like a premium mobile/desktop game.

Core Requirements
1. Game Rules

Implement official Ludo rules:

4 players: Red, Blue, Green, Yellow
Each player starts with 4 tokens in their home area
A token can leave home only after rolling a 6
Rolling a 6 grants another turn
Multiple consecutive 6s should follow standard Ludo rules
Capture opponent tokens when landing on them
Safe zones where captures are not allowed
Correct movement path for each color
Exact winning condition
First player to bring all 4 tokens to center wins
2. Game Modes

Implement:

Human vs Human (4 players)
Human vs AI
AI vs AI
2-player mode
3-player mode
4-player mode
3. AI System

Create intelligent AI:

Chooses captures when possible
Prioritizes reaching safe zones
Tries to move tokens closest to home
Avoids risky moves
Makes strategic decisions
4. UI/UX Design

Create a modern premium interface:

Glassmorphism effects
Smooth gradients
Animated shadows
Responsive layout
Mobile friendly
Tablet friendly
Desktop friendly

Visual style:

Modern gaming dashboard
Professional look
Vibrant but clean colors
Smooth transitions everywhere
5. Advanced Animations

Implement rich animations:

Dice Animation
Realistic rolling animation
3D rotation effect
Motion blur effect
Bounce effect after stopping
Token Movement
Smooth path traversal
Step-by-step movement
Bounce on each tile
Glow while moving
Capture Animation
Explosion effect
Particle burst
Shake effect
Return-to-home animation
Win Animation
Fireworks
Confetti
Glow effects
Trophy popup
Victory screen
UI Animations
Hover effects
Button ripple effects
Smooth fades
Scale animations
Pulse effects
6. Sound System

Use browser-generated sounds only.

Implement:

Dice roll sound
Token move sound
Capture sound
Victory sound
Button click sound

No external audio files.

7. Game Features

Include:

Start Menu
Pause Menu
Restart Game
New Game
Settings Panel
Sound On/Off
Animation On/Off
Dark Mode
Light Mode
8. Statistics

Track:

Number of rolls
Captures
Tokens moved
Time played
Games won

Store using LocalStorage.

9. Save System

Automatically save:

Current board state
Turn information
Dice values
Player progress

Restore automatically on page refresh.

10. Code Quality

Requirements:

Clean architecture
Modular JavaScript
Object-oriented design
Well-commented code
No duplicated logic
Separation of concerns
Suggested Structure

/index.html

/styles.css

/script.js

Performance
60 FPS animations
Efficient DOM updates
Minimal reflows
Optimized rendering
Extra Features (Bonus)

If possible implement:

Theme selector
Neon theme
Cyberpunk theme
Classic theme
Leaderboard
Achievement system
Turn timer
Undo move (where valid)
Dice statistics chart
Particle engine using pure JavaScript
Deliverables

Generate:

Complete HTML file
Complete CSS file
Complete JavaScript file
Fully functional without dependencies
Ready to run by opening index.html
Final Objective

The final result should look and feel like a polished commercial browser game rather than a basic coding-project Ludo board. Focus heavily on smooth animations, beautiful visuals, responsive design, and clean game architecture while keeping everything implemented strictly using HTML, CSS, and Vanilla JavaScript.
